naturalMeaning: 对财务数据做详细计算和分析，验证是否合理
example: I need to run the numbers on your MRR growth before I take this to our investment committee.
exampleTranslation: 我需要先算一下你们的月经常性收入增长数据，才能提交给投委会。

naturalMeaning: 公司每月净消耗现金的速度，衡量还能撑多久
example: At your current burn rate, you've got about six months of runway — that's tight for closing a Series B.
exampleTranslation: 按目前的烧钱速度，你们大概还有六个月的现金跑道——这对融B轮来说很紧张。

naturalMeaning: 总收入层面的增长情况，还没扣除任何成本费用
example: Your top-line growth is impressive at 120% YoY, but I'm worried about what's happening to gross margin.
exampleTranslation: 你们120%的年同比增长确实亮眼，但我担心毛利率的变化。

naturalMeaning: 单个产品或客户的盈利模型算下来不成立，规模越大亏越多
example: Your CAC is three times LTV — the unit economics just don't pencil out at any scale.
exampleTranslation: 获客成本是客户终身价值的三倍——不管规模多大，单位经济都算不通。

naturalMeaning: 毛利率在持续下降，成本增长速度超过收入增长速度
example: I see gross margin compression from 78% to 62% over the last four quarters — what's driving that?
exampleTranslation: 过去四个季度毛利率从78%降到62%——是什么原因导致的？

naturalMeaning: 在对方报价的基础上主动打折，降低估值
example: Given the customer concentration risk, I'm taking a 20% haircut on valuation.
exampleTranslation: 考虑到客户集中度风险，我要在估值上打八折。

naturalMeaning: 收入的可持续性和可预测性，区分一次性收入和经常性收入
example: Your total revenue is fine, but I'm looking at revenue quality — only 40% is recurring, the rest is services.
exampleTranslation: 总收入没问题，但我在看收入质量——只有40%是经常性收入，其余是服务收入。

naturalMeaning: 终于找到解决某个难题的方法或实现了关键突破
example: Once they cracked the code on enterprise sales cycles, their ACV doubled in six months.
exampleTranslation: 他们一旦找到了企业销售周期的诀窍，平均合同价值就在六个月内翻了一倍。

naturalMeaning: 极其仔细地检查每个细节，不放过任何小问题
example: I sweated the details on their revenue recognition policy and found they're booking annual contracts upfront.
exampleTranslation: 我仔细研究了他们的收入确认政策，发现他们把年付合同一次性确认为收入了。

naturalMeaning: 赚回获取客户所花成本需要多少个月
example: A 24-month CAC payback period is too long for a product with 8% monthly churn — you never recoup.
exampleTranslation: 对于月流失率8%的产品来说，24个月的获客成本回收期太长了——根本收不回来。

naturalMeaning: 深入探讨某个具体问题或数据点（电脑双击打开文件夹的比喻）
example: Can you double-click on that 15% spike in COGS last quarter? I want to understand what changed.
exampleTranslation: 你能详细说说上季度销售成本15%的飙升吗？我想了解是什么变了。

naturalMeaning: 深入检查技术系统的真实状况，不只看表面演示
example: We're bringing in a senior engineer to look under the hood before we wire the money.
exampleTranslation: 我们要请一位资深工程师来仔细检查技术架构，然后再打款。

naturalMeaning: 结构混乱、缺乏模块化、难以维护和扩展的代码
example: The frontend looks clean, but the backend is spaghetti code — onboarding a new engineer takes three months.
exampleTranslation: 前端看着挺干净，但后端代码一团乱麻——新工程师上手需要三个月。

naturalMeaning: 为了赶进度走捷径留下的代码问题，以后需要花时间还债
example: They've been shipping so fast that the tech debt is now a real drag on feature velocity.
exampleTranslation: 他们上线太快了，技术债务已经开始拖慢新功能的开发速度了。

naturalMeaning: 系统或团队中某个环节一旦出问题，整个系统就会瘫痪
example: Only one engineer understands the payment system — that's a massive single point of failure for us.
exampleTranslation: 只有一个工程师懂支付系统——这对我们来说是个巨大的单点故障风险。

naturalMeaning: 关键人员出意外后项目还能继续的最小人数——数字越小风险越大
example: Their bus factor is literally one — if the CTO gets hit by a bus, nobody can maintain the core algorithm.
exampleTranslation: 他们的关键人风险系数就是1——如果CTO出意外，没人能维护核心算法。

naturalMeaning: 目标过于宏大不切实际，试图一次性解决所有问题
example: Their product roadmap is trying to boil the ocean — they need to pick one use case and nail it first.
exampleTranslation: 他们的产品路线图想一口吃成胖子——应该先选一个场景做透。

expression: the wheels are going to come off
naturalMeaning: 系统或业务正在失控，很快要出大问题
example: With this much tech debt and a team of three maintaining production, the wheels are going to come off soon.
exampleTranslation: 技术债务这么重，生产环境只有三个人维护，很快就要出大问题了。

expression: change the tires while the car is moving
naturalMeaning: 在业务不中断的情况下做重大技术改造，风险极高
example: Migrating to microservices with 2 million daily active users is changing the tires while the car is moving.
exampleTranslation: 在有两百万日活用户的情况下迁移到微服务，就像在行驶中换轮胎。

naturalMeaning: 系统或流程靠临时补丁凑合维持，随时可能崩
example: Their deployment pipeline is held together with duct tape and bash scripts — one update breaks everything.
exampleTranslation: 他们的部署流程全靠胶带和bash脚本凑合着——随便一个更新就全崩了。

naturalMeaning: 架构混乱、没有清晰层次和模块划分的软件系统
example: The codebase started clean but after three years of feature hacking it's turned into a big ball of mud.
exampleTranslation: 代码库一开始很干净，但经过三年的功能堆砌已经变成了一团乱泥。

naturalMeaning: 进入某个市场的基本门槛，有了不一定赢，但没有一定会输
example: AI features are now table stakes in this space — not having them will lose you every deal.
exampleTranslation: 在这个领域AI功能已经是入场券了——没有的话你一个单都赢不了。

naturalMeaning: 完全公开内部信息，毫无保留地展示一切
example: The CTO opened the kimono and showed us their entire architecture, including the parts that are a mess.
exampleTranslation: CTO毫无保留地展示了整个架构，包括那些一团糟的部分。

naturalMeaning: 知识产权归属清晰，没有被盗用、纠纷或所有权争议
example: We need to confirm the IP is clean before we close — no former employers claiming ownership of the code.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在交割前确认知识产权是干净的——没有前雇主声称拥有代码所有权。

naturalMeaning: 明显的警告信号，提示存在潜在严重问题
example: The fact that they have no IP assignment agreements with their engineers is a massive red flag.
exampleTranslation: 他们和工程师之间没有知识产权转让协议，这是个巨大的危险信号。

naturalMeaning: 合同中标准化的通用条款，通常不需要逐条谈判
example: The indemnification clause looks like standard boilerplate, but I want our counsel to review it anyway.
exampleTranslation: 赔偿条款看起来是标准模板，但我还是想让我们的律师过一遍。

naturalMeaning: 卖方对目标公司状况所做的法定声明和承诺
example: Their reps and warranties around IP ownership are too narrow — we need broader coverage.
exampleTranslation: 他们对知识产权所有权的陈述与保证范围太窄了——我们需要更宽泛的覆盖。

naturalMeaning: 合同中定义的会严重影响交易价值的重大变故
example: If a material adverse change occurs between signing and closing, we have the right to walk.
exampleTranslation: 如果在签约和交割之间发生重大不利变化，我们有权退出。

naturalMeaning: 材料内容单薄，缺乏足够的信息或证据支撑
example: Their patent portfolio is a thin file — just two provisional applications, both filed last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 他们的专利组合很单薄——只有两个临时申请，还都是上季度才提交的。

naturalMeaning: 禁止创始人和关键员工在一定时期内从事竞争业务的条款
example: The founders have no non-compete with their previous employer — that opens up IP risk.
exampleTranslation: 创始人和前雇主之间没有竞业限制协议——这带来了IP风险。

naturalMeaning: 美国默认的雇佣制度，雇主或员工可随时终止雇佣关系，无需理由
example: Make sure your employment contracts are at-will and you have proper offer letters for every employee.
exampleTranslation: 确保你们的雇佣合同是任意雇佣制，每个员工都有正式的录用通知书。

naturalMeaning: 仅能维持生存但无法增长或盈利的公司，靠不断融资续命
example: If we don't fix the revenue model, they'll become a zombie company living round to round.
exampleTranslation: 如果不解决收入模式问题，他们会变成一轮一轮融资续命的僵尸企业。

naturalMeaning: 仅从表面信息判断，不做深入分析
example: On its face, the contract looks fine, but the liability cap is way too low for our comfort.
exampleTranslation: 从表面看合同没问题，但责任赔偿上限太低，我们不太放心。

naturalMeaning: 法律上穿透公司有限责任保护，追究股东或创始人的个人责任
example: If they've been commingling personal and business funds, a court could pierce the corporate veil.
exampleTranslation: 如果他们混用个人和公司资金，法院可以刺破公司面纱追究个人责任。

naturalMeaning: 某件事如果被媒体报道会给公司或投资人带来负面声誉影响
example: If we invest and they get sued for IP theft, that's headline risk we don't need.
exampleTranslation: 如果我们投了之后他们被起诉盗用知识产权，那是我们不需要的头条风险。

naturalMeaning: 某个产品理论上可以触达的全球市场总规模
example: Their TAM slide says 50 billion, but that's counting every company on earth — it's way overstated.
exampleTranslation: 他们的TAM幻灯片说500亿，但那把地球上所有公司都算上了——严重夸大了。

naturalMeaning: 收入过度依赖少数几个大客户的风险
example: Customer concentration is a deal-killer here — their top customer makes up 60% of revenue.
exampleTranslation: 客户集中度是要命的问题——最大一个客户占了60%的收入。

naturalMeaning: 客户流失严重，一边进新客户一边大量流失
example: They're adding 100 customers a month, but losing 80 to churn — it's a leaky bucket.
exampleTranslation: 每月新增100个客户，但流失80个——这就像个漏水的桶。

naturalMeaning: 先拿下小订单或小团队，然后逐步扩展到大企业整体
example: They have a classic land-and-expand model — get in with one department, then sell to the whole enterprise.
exampleTranslation: 他们用的是经典的先登录再扩张模式——先进入一个部门，再卖给整个企业。

naturalMeaning: 收入波动巨大，不可预测，季度之间差异很大
example: Their revenue is lumpy because of large enterprise deals — one quarter is 3 million, the next is 200K.
exampleTranslation: 因为做了大企业单子，他们的收入波动很大——这个季度300万，下个季度20万。

naturalMeaning: 初步的、正在增长的积极迹象，但还不能确定是趋势
example: There are some green shoots in the SMB segment — a few new logos signed last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 中小客户方面有一些好的苗头——上季度签了几个新客户。

naturalMeaning: 给现有或过去客户打电话核实产品和团队的真实表现
example: We did five reference calls with their customers — three said the onboarding was a complete nightmare.
exampleTranslation: 我们给他们五个客户打了背景电话——三个说上线流程简直是噩梦。

naturalMeaning: 客户非常紧急、必须马上去解决的痛点
example: Every CIO has a hair-on-fire problem with legacy billing systems — that's exactly the wedge they need.
exampleTranslation: 每个CIO都在为老旧的计费系统焦头烂额——这正好是他们的切入点。

naturalMeaning: 作为切入点的首个目标细分市场，站稳后再拓展
example: Mid-market healthcare is their beachhead — that's where they're winning consistently.
exampleTranslation: 中型医疗企业是他们的滩头阵地——这是他们持续赢单的市场。

naturalMeaning: 公司有足够的资金和能力持续运营下去，不会在近期倒闭
example: After looking at their cash position, I'm not convinced they're a going concern beyond 12 months.
exampleTranslation: 看完他们的现金状况后，我不确定他们12个月后还能持续经营。

naturalMeaning: 顶尖人才，在同类岗位中排在前10%
example: The CEO is an A-player, but most of the VPs are B-players — that's a problem at scale.
exampleTranslation: CEO是顶尖人才，但大部分VP只能算B级——这在规模扩张时会是问题。

naturalMeaning: 所有人都知道但没人愿意明说的明显问题
example: The elephant in the room is that the CEO has never managed more than 15 people before.
exampleTranslation: 房间里的大象是——CEO之前从没管过超过15个人的团队。

naturalMeaning: 公司过度依赖某个人，这个人一旦离开业务会受到严重影响
example: The entire sales org depends on the VP of Sales' personal relationships — that's massive key person risk.
exampleTranslation: 整个销售团队都依赖销售VP的个人关系——这是巨大的关键人物风险。

naturalMeaning: 创始人对目标市场的了解程度和适应程度
example: The founder-market fit is incredible — she's been a CTO in this exact industry for 12 years.
exampleTranslation: 创始人与市场的匹配度非常高——她在这个行业做了12年的CTO。

naturalMeaning: 自己也投入了真金白银，不只是拿别人的钱
example: I like that the founders have real skin in the game — they put 500K of their own money in.
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢创始人们自己也投了真金白银——他们自己掏了50万美金。

naturalMeaning: 团队人才储备充足，关键人才离职能快速补上（体育替补席比喻）
example: They have a deep bench in engineering — if the VP leaves, two senior directors can step up.
exampleTranslation: 他们的工程团队板凳很深——即使VP走了，还有两个资深总监能顶上。

expression: too many cooks in the kitchen
naturalMeaning: 决策者太多导致混乱和效率低下
example: Four co-founders with overlapping responsibilities — feels like too many cooks in the kitchen.
exampleTranslation: 四个联合创始人职权重叠——我觉得决策者太多了。

naturalMeaning: 幕后运作的真实场景，通常比较混乱丑陋（不宜公开）
example: I spent a day with the sales team and saw the sausage factory — no playbook, no process, just pure hustle.
exampleTranslation: 我跟销售团队待了一天，看到了幕后的真实情况——没有标准流程，就是硬拼。

naturalMeaning: 落后于竞争对手或行业趋势
example: Their hiring is behind the curve — competitors are grabbing AI talent while they're still debating headcount.
exampleTranslation: 他们的招聘已经落后了——竞争对手在抢AI人才，他们还在纠结编制。

naturalMeaning: 不是创新者，但能迅速复制和改进别人的产品并推向市场
example: They're a fast follower, not a pioneer — there's nothing novel, but their execution is world-class.
exampleTranslation: 他们是快速跟随者，不是开拓者——没什么新东西，但执行力是世界级的。

naturalMeaning: 凭直觉和经验快速判断某件事是否靠谱
example: Their projected 300% growth in a flat market doesn't pass the smell test.
exampleTranslation: 在平平的市场里预测300%的增长——这个数字直觉上就不对劲。

naturalMeaning: 直觉上觉得有问题，但暂时说不清楚具体原因
example: Something about their cap table feels off — too many small investors with unusual liquidation preferences.
exampleTranslation: 他们的股权结构表感觉不太对——太多小投资者带着不寻常的优先清算权。

naturalMeaning: 预示更大问题的早期预警信号
example: The sudden drop in NPS score is a canary in the coal mine for deeper customer satisfaction issues.
exampleTranslation: NPS评分突然下降是客户满意度深层问题的早期预警信号。

naturalMeaning: 极其复杂混乱、难以梳理清楚的事情
example: Their cap table is a complete hairball — six rounds with different preferences and conversion rights.
exampleTranslation: 他们的股权结构表一团乱麻——六轮融资各不相同的优先权和转换权。

naturalMeaning: 基于未来的预期而非当前现实来做投资决定（赌未来的增长）
example: We'd be investing on the come here — the product isn't proven, but the market need is undeniable.
exampleTranslation: 这次投资是赌未来的——产品还没验证，但市场需求不可否认。

naturalMeaning: 故意低估预测数据，以便实际表现超过预期
example: I think they're sandbagging their Q4 numbers — the pipeline is three times what they're projecting.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得他们在Q4预测上藏了一手——管道数据是他们预测的三倍。

naturalMeaning: 利用规则漏洞获取不当利益，不靠真实业绩
example: They're gaming the system by counting signed LOIs as closed-won deals in their pipeline report.
exampleTranslation: 他们在管道报告里把签署的意向书算作已成交——这是在钻空子。

naturalMeaning: 信息量过大，根本来不及消化
example: The data room has 800 files — it's like drinking from a firehose. Can you flag the must-reads?
exampleTranslation: 数据室有800个文件——信息量太大了。你能标出必须看的吗？

naturalMeaning: 把所有原始文件一次性全部丢出来，不做整理或分类
example: They did a 2,000-file data dump into the virtual data room with zero organization or index.
exampleTranslation: 他们把2000个文件全部倒进了虚拟数据室，没有任何整理或索引。

naturalMeaning: 用于尽调的在线安全文档共享平台
example: The legal team needs access to the virtual data room by end of day to start the review.
exampleTranslation: 法务团队今天下班前需要开通虚拟数据室的访问权限，开始审查。

naturalMeaning: 记录和文件证据，证明某件事发生过的书面凭证
example: There's no paper trail for those vendor payments — that's going to be an issue in the audit.
exampleTranslation: 那些供应商付款没有任何书面记录——这在审计时会是问题。

naturalMeaning: 走过场式地完成要求，并不真正关心质量或效果
example: Their cybersecurity audit feels like a check-the-box exercise — they hired the cheapest vendor and got a rubber stamp.
exampleTranslation: 他们的网络安全审计感觉就是在走过场——选了最便宜的服务商拿了个橡皮图章。

naturalMeaning: 不经仔细审查就批准，走形式的批准流程
example: I'm not going to rubber stamp this deal — there are too many unresolved diligence items.
exampleTranslation: 我不会随便批准这个交易的——尽调里太多问题还没解决。

naturalMeaning: 尝试各种方法看看哪个有效，没有明确策略
example: Their GTM strategy is just throwing spaghetti on the wall — nothing is focused or intentional.
exampleTranslation: 他们的市场策略就是在瞎试——缺乏聚焦和针对性。

naturalMeaning: 非常明显的决定，完全不需要犹豫
example: At this valuation with these growth metrics, it's a no-brainer — we should lead the round.
exampleTranslation: 以这个估值配上这样的增长数据，根本不需要考虑——我们应该领投。

naturalMeaning: 稍后再重新讨论或联系
example: Let me circle back with my partners after I finish the data room review and I'll have an answer by Friday.
exampleTranslation: 等我审完数据室后再跟合伙人重新讨论，周五前给你回复。

naturalMeaning: 先把某个议题搁置，等条件成熟后再回头讨论
example: Let's put a pin in the valuation discussion until we finish the technical diligence.
exampleTranslation: 估值问题先放一放，等我们完成技术尽调再说。

naturalMeaning: 全力投入、不加保留地支持某个项目或决定
example: If we do this deal, we need to go all-in — half-measures won't work with this management team.
exampleTranslation: 如果做这个交易，就必须全力投入——对这个管理团队，半心半意的做法行不通。

naturalMeaning: 基于充分的分析和信心做出的果断决策
example: After reviewing the full diligence report, I can make this call with conviction — let's move forward.
exampleTranslation: 在审完全部尽调报告后，我有信心做出决策——推进吧。

naturalMeaning: 即使相信对方说的是真的，也必须自己确认核实
example: I trust the CEO, but trust but verify — let's confirm the numbers with an independent audit.
exampleTranslation: 我相信CEO，但信任也要核实——我们还是通过独立审计确认一下数据。
